Package com.mentor.chs.plugin.sbom

  • Interface Summary 
    Interface Description
    IXOperation
    Operation Plugin class used for integration with Capital Harness MPM SBOM generation.
    IXOperation.IXOperationType
    The operation type is mainly used for presentation and management of operations.
    IXOperationParametersSerializer
    This class represents the pluggable part of the operation which manages its own parameters and provides a serialized version of those for Capital to handle their persistence.
    IXOperationUI
    This class represents the pluggable part of the operation which provides a GUI for it.
    IXOperationUI.IXParameterChangeListener
    Interface to be called by the Parameters Editor when this operation's parameters have changed and/or when their values validity has changed.
    IXSBOMBaseContext
    SBOM Context information passed by the engine to be used in plugin operations.
    IXSBOMBaseContextListener
    A supported plug-in implementing this interface can access appropriate IXSBOMBaseContext by storing in an instance variable the context passed in as a parameter to IXSBOMBaseContextListener.setSBOMBaseContext(IXSBOMBaseContext).
    IXSBOMContext
    SBOM Context information passed by the engine to be used in plugin operations.
    IXSBOMEvaluationContext
    The SBOM evaluation context represents information about state of the SBOM used by processes that evaluate one sub-assembly of the SBOM at a time, exposing the notion of a current sub-assembly.
    IXSBOMHarnessUtilities
    SBOM utilities for interrogating the SBOM's harness design.
  • Enum Summary 
    Enum Description
    IXOperation.StandardOperationTypeEnum
    Exposed standard operation types.
